package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for shared_integration_test_setup_not_centralized_under_test_support: Repeated app, DB, or router bootstrapping that is not moved into shared test support.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule186NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule186NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule186NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario186Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule186NegativeService, input Rule186NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
